---
title: "ARBO-WATCH"
subtitle: "A 4-year workshop series on arboreal biodiversity monitoring"
listing:
  id: workshop-listing
  contents: workshops/*/index.qmd
  type: table
  fields: [date, title, facilitator]
  sort: "date asc"
  date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
---

## About the Project

ARBO-WATCH is a 4-year workshop series focused on arboreal biodiversity monitoring. The project brings together researchers, field ecologists, and data scientists to develop and share methods for monitoring tree-dwelling species using modern data collection and analysis workflows.



## Introduction Video

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}



## Educators

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
![Jane Doe](assets/images/educator-01.jpg){width=150 style="border-radius: 50%;"}

**Jane Doe**  
*Lead Facilitator*  
Jane leads the ARBO-WATCH programme. She specialises in forest ecology and biodiversity assessment.
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
![John Smith](assets/images/educator-02.jpg){width=150 style="border-radius: 50%;"}

**John Smith**  
*Data Science Instructor*  
John teaches spatial data analysis and reproducible workflows using R and Quarto.
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
![Maria Lopez](assets/images/educator-03.jpg){width=150 style="border-radius: 50%;"}

**Maria Lopez**  
*R Programming Instructor*  
Maria specialises in ecological statistics and tidyverse-based data wrangling.
:::

:::



## Participants

| Name | Affiliation | Cohort |
|---|---|---|
| Alice Brown | University A | 2024 |
| Bob Chen | Institute B | 2024 |
| Carol Davis | Organisation C | 2025 |



## Workshop Schedule

::: {#workshop-listing}
:::
